vectors.name: unicode-cyrillic

vectors.name: unicode-cjk

decoded.notes: 請在30天內付款。感謝您的支持。

vectors.diagnostic: Unicode: CJK (3-byte UTF-8) in item.description and notes. wire_hex = Brotli-compressed wire, or == canonical_hex when Brotli expands (small payloads)

vectors.name: unicode-emoji
vectors.diagnostic: Unicode: emoji (4-byte UTF-8 surrogate pairs) in from.name and notes. Codec treats as bytes — no normalization. wire_hex = Brotli-compressed wire, or == canonical_hex when Brotli expands (small payloads)

vectors.name: unicode-rtl
vectors.diagnostic: Unicode: Arabic RTL (2-4 byte UTF-8) in from.name, description, notes. Codec treats as opaque bytes — no reorder or normalize. wire_hex = Brotli-compressed wire, or == canonical_hex when Brotli expands (small payloads)

vectors.name: unicode-mixed

decoded.notes: Mixed: Кириллица + 中文 + العربية + emoji 🎯

vectors.diagnostic: Unicode: mixed scripts (ASCII + Cyrillic + CJK + Arabic + emoji) across all text fields. wire_hex = Brotli-compressed wire, or == canonical_hex when Brotli expands (small payloads)

vectors.name: malformed-non-canonical-varint
vectors.diagnostic: malformed:canonical — LEB128 varint [0x80, 0x00] encodes value 0 with a spurious continuation byte; canonical form requires the shortest encoding (single 0x00 byte). Decoder must reject.

vectors.name: malformed-unknown-content-tag
vectors.diagnostic: malformed:canonical — TLV tag 39 (0x27) is outside the v1 KNOWN_TAGS set. Decoder must reject with UnknownExtension before checksum validation.

vectors.name: decode_unknown_odd_tag_in_full_invoice
vectors.diagnostic: Y1 forward-compat: unknown odd TLV tag 39 (0x27, value=0xDEAD) embedded in a full invoice is silently ignored per BOLT-12 odd/even rule. Domain separator (TLV type 31) is computed over ALL TLV bytes including the odd-tag bytes, excluding type 31 itself. Decoder produces the original Invoice struct unchanged. Decision: codec-bolt12-odd-even-forward-compat.

vectors.name: decode_unknown_odd_tag_ignored
vectors.diagnostic: Y1 forward-compat: unknown odd tag 39 (value=0xDEAD) is silently ignored per BOLT-12 odd/even rule. Domain separator is computed over ALL TLV bytes including the odd-tag bytes. Decoder produces identical Invoice struct to a wire without the extra tag. Odd tags = optional extension (safe to ignore); decision: codec-bolt12-odd-even-forward-compat.

vectors.name: decode_unknown_even_tag_rejected
vectors.diagnostic: Y1 forward-compat: unknown even tag 26 (value=0xBEEF) must be rejected with UnknownExtension(26). Even tags = mandatory schema change — decoder MUST fail if unknown (schema_version bump required). Decision: codec-bolt12-odd-even-forward-compat.

vectors.name: decode_non_monotone_rejected
vectors.diagnostic: Y2 strict-monotone: TLV stream with tags [5, 3, 7] — tag 3 appears after tag 5, violating strict-monotone ordering. Decoder must reject with InvalidData. Pre-fix: BTreeMap silently re-canonicalized to {3,5,7} and accepted the wire. Decision: codec-bolt12-strict-monotone-decode.
